title: hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. andrasovszkyi
intro: Hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. andrasovszkyi is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. andrasovszkyi include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain infections. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties.
